findings.description: Loss of centered alignment in the document header.
findings.evidence: The title, meeting details, location, and date are centered in the PDF. In the HTML, this entire header section is left-aligned.

findings.description: Schedule format altered from dot-leader text to a formal table.
findings.evidence: The PDF uses dot leaders to visually connect the time, topic, and presenter. The HTML converts this structure into a formal grid table and introduces column headers ('Time', 'Topic', 'Presenter') that do not exist in the source document.
